title: A letter to a friend
explanation:
A letter to a friend

Read the email.

Dear Emma,

How are you? I'm fine. I'm on holiday in Greece with my family. The weather is beautiful and the food is delicious. We swim in the sea every day. I miss you! See you next month.

Love,
Lucy

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: Lucy will see Emma [*next month|next week|tomorrow].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Lucy says the food is ____. | *delicious | cold | fine
They swim in the ____ every day. | *sea | shop | school

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.
